project_overview.name: Synergy Petroleum
project_overview.description: Modern, 3D-styled web rebuild of casynergy.com with rich motion animations, animated imagery, smooth page transitions, and an admin dashboard.
project_overview.target_audience: Northern California fuel distributor, B2B clients, fleet operators, gas station operators

headings.strategy: Expressive and large (text-5xl to text-6xl+). Must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter). Never use Inter for headings.

body.strategy: Clean, readable, moderate scales. Left-align for better readability.

colors.archetype: ARCHETYPE 7: ELECTRIC & NEON (Future, Speed, Disruption) mixed with LUXURY (Premium, Depth, Mystery)

primary.description: Energy Cyan - for glowing accents and primary actions

secondary.description: Deep Slate - for secondary cards and muted UI elements

background.description: Void Black / Deepest Midnight Blue for cinematic depth. Never use pure #000000.

accent.description: Neon Green for 'renewable fuels' and positive indicators

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Glassmorphism for sticky headers (Optical Clarity with backdrop-saturate-150 and border-white/10). Solid flat backgrounds with 1px subtle borders for dashboard cards.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Avoid full-screen gradients. Use localized blurred orbs (glows) behind 3D objects or text. Max overlay opacity for images is bg-black/50.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px border-white/10 for dark mode marketing sections. Subtle grid borders for the Services list.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient glows using Tailwind drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(14,165,233,0.3)] for energy elements. Soft diffuse shadows for dashboard cards.

marketing_pages.grid: Bento grids with grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 and gap-8 to gap-12. Asymmetry and overlapping elements.
marketing_pages.spacing: Generous spacing. py-24, py-32 for sections. Containers with borders need p-8 padding internally.
marketing_pages.hero: Full viewport height (min-h-screen) with 3D canvas background and floating objects. Text overlaid with z-10.

dashboard.grid: High Density Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6.
dashboard.spacing: Dense and compact. p-4 or p-6. Every pixel must be utilized.

motion.interactions: Magnetic buttons, scroll-triggered fade-up and parallax for images. Page transitions using Framer Motion (AnimatePresence).
motion.hover_states: Hover states must explicitly set text color and background. Cards should slightly lift (-translate-y-1) and increase border opacity.
motion.micro_animations: Use framer-motion for smooth entrance animations. Staggered lists for Services and Locations.

accessibility.contrast: Maintain 4.5:1 ratio. Text over images must use bg-black/50 or text-shadow.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query. Add aria-hidden to decorative 3D elements.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

react-three-fiber.usage: Use for the Home page hero section. Add floating fuel-pump, barrel, and abstract energy shapes.
react-three-fiber.lighting: Ensure adequate lighting (ambientLight, directionalLight) so objects are clearly visible against dark background.

images.description: Red semi-truck driving through scenic highway
Abstract purple and blue energy swirl

components.strategy: Marketing pages: Custom HTML/Tailwind + framer-motion. Dashboard/Forms: Customized Shadcn UI components.
components.map: Leaflet for interactive map (react-leaflet, leaflet) on Locations page. Custom dark map tiles (e.g., CartoDB Dark Matter).
components.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react for marketing, lucide-react for dashboard.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required libraries: yarn add framer-motion gsap @gsap/react @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei three react-leaflet leaflet @types/leaflet lenis @phosphor-icons/react
Never use transparent header without a blur or scrim. Ensure sticky header has z-50 and readable contrast.
Do not use generic 'Vercel' look for marketing pages. Use bento grids and asymmetric layouts.
Dashboard should have a sidebar navigation and topbar with dense grid layout for widgets.
All forms (Contact, Admin Login) must use Shadcn form components, heavily customized to match the brand.
Do not center align standard text; left-align paragraphs and dense content.
Ensure dark mode is the primary theme for marketing, matching the 'cinematic' requirement. Do not force light mode on the homepage.
Use data-testid on all buttons and form inputs.
Add 'dark' class to html or body by default for the marketing view.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic 'AI slop' aesthetics. Use layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Create depth through glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Never apply universal transitions (e.g., transition: all). Target specific properties to prevent transform breaking.
Do not center align the App container (no .App { text-align: center; }).
Use modern button styles (pill-shaped or sharp) with interaction animations.
Never use AI assistant emoji characters (🤖🧠) for icons. Use Phosphor or Lucide.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
